authorizationInterpretation.reason: provider live smoke requires explicit authorization and server-side runtime key evidence

requiredForNextLoop: User says: explicitly authorize one knowledge-mode DeepSeek provider live smoke
Ops confirms DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is configured in production server-side runtime only
Run uses SCM_DEEPSEEK_PROVIDER_CALL_AUTHORIZED=1 only for that single command
Run remains knowledge mode; web mode stays closed
Evidence is redacted and records traceId/runId/usage/answerLength/doesNotProve only
doesNotProve: Does not prove provider call path
Does not prove DeepSeek answer quality
Does not prove live trace/run creation
Does not authorize production writes or ERP/OMS/WMS writeback
